stocks.ai_explanation: Exxon Mobil Corporation (XOM) is a leading integrated oil company involved in exploration, production, refining, marketing, and transportation of petroleum products. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
Chevron Corporation (CVX) is another prominent American oil company focused on upstream activities such as drilling and producing oil and gas. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
Neste Oyj (NEE) is a Finnish producer of renewable diesel fuel and bio-based chemicals. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
Shell plc (SHEL) operates in the energy sector, focusing on oil and gas exploration, production, and trading. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
British Petroleum (BP) is a multinational oil and gas company engaged in exploration, production, refining, and marketing of petroleum products. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.

disclaimer: Educational use only. Not financial advice.
